prompt:
Create an ultra-premium cinematic COUNTRY automotive editorial poster in a luxury sketch + watercolor fusion style.

Subject:
The world’s most elite COUNTRY hypercars and luxury performance machines:
CAR NAMES

Composition:
Heroic front 3/4 angle composition.
One dominant hypercar in foreground with the others layered behind like legendary rivals.
Low-angle cinematic perspective for dominance and luxury aura.
Aggressive motion composition with balanced spacing.

Art Style:
Ultra-detailed hand-drawn ink sketch mixed with realistic watercolor textures.
Luxury magazine editorial aesthetic.
Sharp sketch outlines around body curves.
Energetic brush strokes and paint splashes around the vehicles.
Metallic watercolor diffusion on reflective surfaces.
Highly realistic carbon fiber, LED lighting, and glossy paint reflections.

Background:
Minimal luxury studio environment.
White + matte black gradient backdrop.
Subtle smoke haze, floating dust particles, cinematic showroom lighting.
Abstract watercolor splashes matching each car’s identity:
Royal gold, deep crimson, titanium silver, electric blue, matte black.

Typography:
Large handwritten title:
“TITLE”

Luxury subtitle:
“SUBTITLE”

Small premium typography elements inspired by luxury magazines.
Elegant signature-style text at bottom.
Minimal crown doodles and abstract emblem graphics.

Extra Details:
Subtle gold foil accents.
Soft grunge texture overlay.
Luxury editorial composition.
HDR reflections.
Sharp cinematic shadows.
Premium billionaire aesthetic.

Mood:
Elite, futuristic, untouchable.
Feels like a billion-dollar COUNTRY automotive empire captured as a cinematic luxury poster.

Rendering:
Hyper-realistic, 8K, ultra detailed, cinematic lighting, masterpiece quality, luxury editorial perfection
